inlineContent.text: The protocol is currently only used by localized service

abstract.text: This protocol is used to let device-based services share
behavior, when basing a layout on different device types.
This protocol can be implemented by any classes that can
generate keyboard layouts in various ways.
The layout service to use for iPad devices.
An input set defines the input keys on a keyboard.
This type defines the full set of keys on a keyboard and
is also a namespace for layout-related types.
The layout service to use for the provided context.
This protocol is used to let device-based services share
behavior, when basing a layout on different device types.
The layout service to use for iPad devices.
KeyboardKit helps you create fully customizable keyboard extensions, using Swift and SwiftUI.
